---
name: twn-start-session
description: Load the smallest sufficient TWN context and identify one safe next action.
agent: TWN Implementation Mentor
---

Read `AGENTS.md`, `docs/progress/CURRENT_STATE.md`,
`docs/progress/NEXT_ACTION.md`, and only the feature packet or blueprint context
named there.

Inspect `git status`. Do not edit yet.

Report current phase, task, blueprint references, implementation state,
unresolved decisions, learning objective, smallest safe action, and required
validation. Wait for approval.
